title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat backends with LangChain abstractions.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & async APIs, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat and generate completions.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and aliases.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA and embedding pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks for CPU & GPU Ollama setups plus optional WebUI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on Linux/macOS with a single nix-env command.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server using Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete, summarization, and note-qa powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-keras
summary: Experimental Keras 3 wrapper that exposes Ollama models as keras_nlp generators for fine-tuning.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin for AI writing assistance using Ollama; supports slash commands and block summarization.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/tokio bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.
